pageContext.name: Trafalgar Law (Playback Memories)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are excited to present the Trafalgar Law (Playback Memories) Collectible Figure!  From the One Piece anime comes a new Portrait of Pirates Trafalgar Law figure sitting upon a wooden crate with a mischievous smile and his fingers interlocked, playing back memories and dreaming of finding the One Piece.  Don't miss your chance to add this One Piece collectible figure to your anime figure collection today!
